MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT ROLAND MICHEL'S MOTION TO STRIKE OR DISMISS PORTIONS OF CROSS- COMPLAINT OF DEFENDANT, CROSS-DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT JAY EVERIDGE.

Cross-defendant Roland Michel's motion to strike all four causes of action alleged against him in the cross-complaint filed by cross-complainant Jay Everidge is granted without leave to amend as to all four causes of action. None of the four cross-claims are viable against Mr. Michel because he is not a joint tortfeasor as to the tort allegedly committed against him. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Continued To Jun-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PLUMPJACK MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC, PLUMPJACK MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC's, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT to the sole cause of action for negligence filed by plaintiff Roland Michel is overruled. Paragraphs 18-20 of the first amended complaint allege sufficient facts to support a duty by defendants to take action to prevent the alleged harm to Mr. Michel per Delgado v. Trax Bar & Grill (2005) 36 Cal. 4th 224. The alleged batterer is neither a necessary or an indispensable party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PLUMPJACK MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC, PLUMPJACK MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC's, MOTION TO STRIKE the punitive damages allegatons in the 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT filed by plaintiff Roland Michel is granted. The first amended complaint does not allege ultimate facts showing that the Plumpjack defendants acted or failed to act with malice, oppression or fraud. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
